projectDescription: A full-stack job board platform for developers, featuring AI-powered job summaries via Ollama, a React frontend with authentication and favorites, and a RESTful Express API with filtering and pagination.
keyFeatures: Job listing with text, technology, and level filters
AI-powered job summaries using Ollama (qwen2.5:3b) with streaming responses
Full CRUD REST API built with Express 5 and validated with Zod
React 19 frontend with React Router DOM 7 and lazy-loaded pages
Global state management with Zustand (auth + favorites)
Rate limiting on AI endpoints (5 req/min per IP)
Multiple implementation stages: vanilla JS → React → TypeScript + SQLite
publicApiSurface: GET /jobs — list jobs with optional filters: text, title, level, technology, limit, offset
GET /jobs/:id — get a single job by UUID
PUT /jobs/:id — full update of a job
PATCH /jobs/:id — partial update of a job
GET /ai/summary/:id — generate a streaming AI summary for a job (rate-limited 5/min)
useAISummary(id) — React hook: { summary, loading, error, generateSummary }
useAuthStore — Zustand store: { isLoggedIn, login, logout }
useFavoriteStore — Zustand store: { favorites, addFavorite, removeFavorite, isFavorite, toggleFavorite, countFavorites }
useFilters() — React hook for managing search filter state
useSearchForm() — React hook for search form handling
useRouter() — React hook wrapping React Router's navigation
